titles.text: Higurashi no Naku Koro ni Kizuna Volume III: Rasen
ひぐらしのなく頃に絆 第三巻・螺
Higurashi no Naku Koro ni Kizuna: Daisankan Rasen
Higurashi no Naku Koro ni Kizuna: Daisankan Rasen

descriptions.text: Higurashi no Naku Koro ni Kizuna Volume III: Rasen is the third installment in Higurashi no Naku Koro ni Kizuna, which includes chapters seven and eight from Matsuri and two additional arcs, one based on the manga arc of the same name called Yoigoshi-hen and the other being the third arc of Advanced Story saga named Tokihogushi-hen.
